name: rakshak-ai-root
description: Root orchestrator for Rakshak AI (Frontend, Backend, and LangGraph Agent)

scripts.start: npx concurrently -n "FRONTEND,BACKEND,AGENT" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend" "python -m uvicorn agent.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && pip install -r agent/requirements.txt
